name: gemma4_kv_fp8_baseline
description: FP8 KV cache baseline for Gemma 4 E4B — reference point for TurboQuant comparison.
notes: Gemma 4 E4B with FP8 KV cache baseline (text-only mode)

name: gemma4_kv_turboquant_k8v4
description: TurboQuant with FP8 keys + 4-bit values on Gemma 4 E4B — most conservative TurboQuant preset.
notes: FP8 keys + 4-bit values, no norm correction

name: gemma4_kv_turboquant_4bit_nc
description: TurboQuant with 4-bit MSE keys + 4-bit values + norm correction on Gemma 4 E4B.

name: gemma4_kv_turboquant_k3v4_nc
description: TurboQuant with 3-bit MSE keys + 4-bit values + norm correction on Gemma 4 E4B — high compression.

name: gemma4_kv_turboquant_3bit_nc
description: TurboQuant with 3-bit MSE keys + 3-bit values + norm correction on Gemma 4 E4B — maximum compression.
